title: fix: deploy gen worker before pushing secrets
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- `wrangler secret bulk` edits the latest worker version's settings and fails with Cloudflare 10214 when the latest version isn't the deployed one
- That drift state is left behind by a manual `wrangler versions upload` + rollback (happened 2026-06-27), and silently breaks the next CI deploy
- Reordering so deploy runs first guarantees latest == deployed before the secret push, eliminating the 10214 class
- A brand-new secret is briefly absent in the seconds between deploy and push, which self-heals

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Deploy first, secrets later
gist.blurb: We've reordered our Cloudflare deployment steps so the gen worker deploys before secrets are pushed, fixing a pesky CI error.
gist.summary: Reordered the Cloudflare deployment workflow for the gen worker to run `wrangler deploy` before pushing secrets, preventing Cloudflare error 10214 after manual rollbacks.
gist.impact: Internal CI deployments for the gen worker are now more resilient to version drift and manual rollbacks.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot organizing glowing server boxes (deployments) before putting locks (secrets) on them, representing the new CI step order.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot organizing glowing lime green (#ecf874) server boxes before carefully placing tiny padlocks on them. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head gives a thumbs up. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
